metadata.title: ADC - Ivorian Digital Agency
metadata.description: African Digit Consulting designs digital solutions with strong social and human impact in Africa. Digital in service of people, grounded in local realities.
metadata.ogTitle: ADC - Digital solutions with strong social and human impact
metadata.ogDescription: African Digit Consulting designs useful, sustainable digital solutions adapted to local African realities. Digital in service of people.
